pi_items.source: Explicitly defined in verifier.py (DASHBOARD_NAME = 'Post-Incident Review') and targeted for deletion in setup_task.sh
Explicitly required by verifier.py which checks for these exact titles via _find_graph calls

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real-world time-series data from the Numenta Anomaly Benchmark (NAB) dataset, downloaded from GitHub during environment setup. The expected dashboard name 'Post-Incident Review' and the three required graph titles ('Hourly Peak CPU', 'Gap-Filled Temperature', 'Request Rate Summary') explicitly match the instructions and are strictly evaluated by the verifier.py script.
